title: Ross Stores touts ‘very strong start’ for spring shopping, boosting case for a retail rebound
author: Bill Peters
fullText: Shares of Ross Stores jumped on Tuesday after the off-price clothing and home-goods chain said it expects sales gains this year, following what management said was a solid start to the spring shopping season.
summary: Shares of Ross Stores jumped on Tuesday after the off-price clothing and home-goods chain said it expects sales gains this year, following what management said was a solid start to the spring shopping season.
